raw_output:
Hey there! I'm glad you're thinking about earning some extra cash. Here are some cool part-time jobs that might be a good fit for someone your age:

1. Babysitting: If you enjoy working with kids, this could be a great choice. You can offer your services to family and friends, or even advertise in your neighborhood.

2. Tutoring: If you excel in certain subjects at school, you might consider tutoring other students. This could happen either in person or online.

3. Pet Sitting/Dog Walking: If you love animals, this could be a fun job for you! You can offer to walk dogs, pet-sit, or even help with basic grooming tasks.

4. Lifeguarding: If you're comfortable around water and enjoy the outdoors, becoming a lifeguard could be an exciting option during summer months.

5. Retail Work: Working at a store like a clothing boutique or bookstore can be interesting and helps you learn about customer service.

6. Food Service: Jobs in restaurants, cafes, or even as a delivery driver for food apps can be fun and fast-paced. Just remember, you'll need to work well under pressure and follow health and safety guidelines.

7. Freelance Work (Art, Writing, Coding, etc.): If you have skills in areas like art, writing, or coding, you might be able to do freelance work online for clients all over the world!
